title: paul russells Electric 1.5L Cordless Kettle (Fast Boil 3KW, Black premium plastic, high gloss finish, Removable washable anti-scale filter, Push to open lid, Perfect pour spout) 15659
features: 3000W Kettle, Ideal for those with busy days, boiling one cup in approximately 45 seconds. With a capacity of 1.5 litres, this electric kettle can boil 5-6 cups at once.
Premium plastic design, complemented by sleek chrome accents with automatic lid and an ideal pour spout
Its large lid opening and clear water level indicator make it easy to monitor the water level before boiling.
Includes removable, washable anti-scale filter to trap any impurities in water and cord storage in the 360 Degree base.
3 Year Manufactures Guarantee when you register the product online.
description: Product Description paul russells Electric Plastic Kettle - 1.5 Litre, 3000-Watts fast Boil power Presenting the Paul Russells Electric Plastic Kettle: 3000W, 1.5L capacity and black in color. The stainless steel cordless kettle is a sleek and efficient kitchen essential. Boasting rapid boiling capability with just a touch of a button, its spill-proof spout ensures mess-free pouring. Safety is paramount, featuring a lift switch-off, automatic shut-off and protection against boil-dry and overheating. With secure cable storage and a visible water scale, precision and safety go hand in hand. Its 360-degree base ensures even heating, while the detachable power base adds versatility. Crafted from durable stainless steel and equipped with STRIX Technology.
